statement: In every magma, Equation 3836 (`x * y = (z * w) * (x * x)`) implies Equation 3534 (`x * y = x * ((z * y) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0654
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) (op x x))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op x (op (op z y) z))
